landing.enterprise_subtitle: Built for the complexity of modern agriculture supply chains.
landing.feature_logistics_desc: Track inventory across multiple locations with real-time sync and automated movement logs.
landing.feature_fintech_desc: Automated ledger entries, interest calculations, and instant payout processing for farmers.
landing.feature_compliance_desc: Built-in GST reporting, Mandi Tax (Cess) automation, and strict audit trails for inspectors.
landing.solutions_subtitle: Designed to scale from small commission agents to national wholesale enterprises.
landing.solution_commission_desc: Manage multiple farmer accounts, weight deductions, and daily auction sheets with ease.
landing.solution_wholesaler_desc: Handle bulk purchase bills, inventory valuation, and large-scale buyer collections.
landing.solution_exporter_desc: Advanced quality tracking, batch management, and logistics integration for global shipping.
landing.compliance_subtitle: Your data is protected by bank-grade encryption and regional data residency standards.
landing.trust_security_desc: Encrypted at rest and in transit.
landing.copyright: MINDT Private Limited © 2026. All rights reserved.
landing.seo_title: Complete Sabji Billing Software for Indian Mandis
landing.seo_subtitle: MandiGrow is India's most complete sabji billing software — built for vegetable traders who need fast, accurate lot billing at the mandi gate. Auto-calculate commission, hamali, and palledari on every sabji sale. Digital mandi khata software for every farmer and buyer.
landing.seo_feature1_desc: Bill by crate, carton, or kilogram. Auto-calculate totals for any sabji variety at the mandi gate.
landing.seo_feature2_desc: Complete fruit billing software — manage purchase bills, sales invoices, and GST for any fruit variety or lot size. Auto-valuation for perishable inventory.
landing.seo_feature3_desc: Vegetable billing made fast — scan crates, auto-calculate weights, and print GST-compliant pattis in seconds.
landing.seo_feature4_desc: Replace paper bahis with digital mandi khata software. Every party balance is live, every settlement clean. Track advances, payments, and credits instantly.
landing.seo_feature5_desc: Also for Anaj Mandi — grain and pulse traders. MandiGrow handles commodity lot tracking, sacks, quintal billing, and trader settlements for wheat, rice, dal, and pulses.
landing.seo_feature6_title: Why MandiGrow is the Best Sabzi Mandi Software
landing.seo_feature6_desc: Built for the morning auction and evening settlement — not adapted from a shop billing app. The only cloud mandi software with mobile, Hindi, GST, and khata all in one.
landing.hero_subtitle: for Fruit, Sabji, Anaj & Commission Agents.
landing.hero_desc: Sabji lot billing, fruit invoicing, anaj mandi, commission, GST, and live khata — works on Android at the mandi gate and desktop in your office. Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada, Malayalam & Urdu.
landing.seo_section_title: Complete Mandi Software for Every Market & Trader
landing.seo_section_subtitle: From sabzi mandi to anaj mandi — MandiGrow handles billing, khata, GST and settlements.
landing.seo_card1_desc: Bill by crate, carton, or kilogram. Auto-calculate totals for any sabji variety at the mandi gate.
landing.seo_card2_desc: Complete fruit billing software — manage purchase bills, sales invoices, and GST for any fruit variety or lot size. Auto-valuation for perishable inventory.
landing.seo_card3_desc: Vegetable billing made fast — scan crates, auto-calculate weights, and print GST-compliant pattis in seconds.
landing.seo_card4_desc: Replace paper bahis with digital mandi khata software. Every party balance is live, every settlement clean. Track advances, payments, and credits instantly.
landing.seo_card5_desc: Also for Anaj Mandi — grain and pulse traders. MandiGrow handles commodity lot tracking, sacks, quintal billing, and trader settlements for wheat, rice, dal, and pulses.
landing.seo_card6_title: Why MandiGrow is the Best Sabzi Mandi Software
landing.seo_card6_desc: Built for the morning auction and evening settlement — not adapted from a shop billing app. The only cloud mandi software with mobile, Hindi, GST, and khata all in one.
landing.why_section_title: Why MandiGrow is the Complete Mandi ERP System
landing.why_section_desc: Operating a wholesale commission agency in India's APMC markets requires extreme speed, accuracy, and trust. A generic accounting software cannot handle the unique challenges of a bustling mandi. That is why thousands of Arhtiyas are upgrading to specialized Mandi ERP software.

seo_pages.fruit_h1: Fruit & Vegetable Billing Software for Indian Wholesale Traders
seo_pages.fruit_p: MandiGrow is India's #1 fruit and vegetable billing software for wholesale traders, commission agents, and mandi operators. Manage purchase bills, sales invoices, perishable stock tracking, GST compliance, and party payments — all in one cloud platform.
seo_pages.gst_h1: GST Mandi Compliance Software for Commission Agents & Traders
seo_pages.gst_p: Generate GST-compliant bills, automate Mandi Tax (Cess), and export GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B instantly. Built specifically for APMC, sabzi mandi, and agricultural wholesale markets.
seo_pages.mandi_h1: The Fastest Mandi Billing Software for Fruits & Vegetable Traders
seo_pages.mandi_p: MandiGrow generates GST-compliant bills for fruits and vegetable trade in under 10 seconds. Built for mandi commission agents, sabzi mandi wholesalers and wholesale dealers across India. Hindi and English. Mobile and desktop. Free 14-day trial.

purchase_bills.title: Purchase Settlements
purchase_bills.financial_ledger_desc: Financial ledger and payouts for farmers, suppliers, and direct purchase inventory.

settings_module.team_subtitle: Manage logins and permissions for your employees
settings_module.to_authorize_text: To authorize employees, first add them under Master Data → Staff / Contacts with contact type set to Staff.
